displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Reduced Salt
• No preservatives
• No artificial colouring
• Adds a delicious salty tang to your food as a seasoning or dipping sauce
• Clear and light in colour, it is an ideal substitue for soya sauce
• Contains less salt than its regular fish sauce

• Usually cooked with fish and seafood

metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Add 300g fish and 1 pack of Brahim's Fish Curry Sauce to 200ml (3/4 cup) water
2. Simmer on medium heat for 15 minutes or until fish is cooked through
3. To enhance flavour, add 100g of vegetables, e.g. eggplant or okra, tomatoes and green chilies
4. Serve hot

offers.description: Buy 1 A1 Instant Curry Sauce - Fish @ $3.45

metaData.Ingredients: Edible Oil, Shallots, Chilli, Lemongrass, Ginger, Salt, Sugar, MSG, Permitted Preservatives
metaData.Preparation:
1. Fish (600g), Vegetable (100g: Lady's Finger, Tomato And Brinjal), Water (400ml), Fresh Thick Coconut Milk (200ml), 1 Packet Of Ikan Brand Sauce
2. Stir fry 1 packet Ikan Brand Sauce together with vegetables until fragrant
3. Add in water and fish, cooked until water boils
4. Stir in coconut milk, simmer over low heat cook until fish is cooked

metaData.Key Information: Lee Kum Kee Reduced Salt Soy Sauce is 25% lower in sodium as compared to regular light soy sauces. Made from selected soy beans, it is brewed according to traditional and natural method to maintain the full soy flavour and aroma. Enjoy healthier meals today with Lee Kum Kee Reduced Salt Soy Sauce!

metaData.SAP Product Name: HEALTHYBOY GLUTEN FREE FISH SAUCE 300ML

product.name: Healthyboy Gluten Free Fish Sauce

metaData.Ingredients: Shallot, Edible Oil, Chilli, Lemongrass, Asam, Sugar, Salt, MSG
metaData.Preparation:
• To Steam:
1. Steam 600gm of fish for 10 minutes
2. Pour in 1 packet Ikan Brand paste
3. Let it steam for another 5 minutes
• To Fry:
1. Stir-fry 600gm of prawn, squid or chicken together with 1 packet Ikan Brand paste
2. Add in 200ml of water (1cup)
3. Continue cooking until boil and serve hot
metaData.SAP Product Name: IKAN BRAND - ASAM STYLE FISH PASTE 200G

product.name: Ikan Brand Instant Fish Sauce - Asam Style

metaData.Preparation:
Cooking Instructions:
1. Mix the Assam Fish paste with water in a pot and bring to boil
2. Add the fish fillet and simmer in medium heat for 10 - 12 minutes
3. Add the tomatoes and ladies fingers and cook for another 2 - 3 minutes or until cooked
4. Ready to serve
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE ASIAN RECIPE MIX - ASSAM CURRY 200G

product.name: FairPrice Asian Recipe Paste Mix - Assam Fish

metaData.SAP Product Name: PRIMA TASTE FISH HEAD CURRY COMPLETE SAUCE 220G

product.name: Prima Taste Complete Sauce - Fish Head Curry

metaData.Ingredients: Coriander, Cummin, Fennel, Turmeric, Dry Chilli, Salt, White Pepper
metaData.Key Information: Convenient and ideal for all home cooked dishes
metaData.Preparation:
1. Heat oil in pan and add in fenugreek, green chilli, shallots and curry leaves, then stir till fragrant
2. Add in curry mixture, tamarind juice, pounded onions and stir-fry briefly
3. Add 2 cups (500ml) of water and salt to taste, then stir well
4. Add in brinjal, tomatoes and ladyfingers, coconut milk and fish fillet
5. Then, cook for another 10 minutes
